reason: One-time structural expansion of the ITALIAN catalogue only (owner decision 2026-07-18): alongside the unchanged European reference catalogue (7,106 canonical products), the IT edition now publishes the Italy-only GSE-native layer — 3,729 in-scope GSE Conto Termico III.A products with no canonical counterpart, admitted under the Italy-specific GSE-native publication tier (scripts/lib/data-sheet-eligibility.mjs → gseNativeEligibility; identity + type + capacity + seasonal performance + provenance). The segment-shift and count change gates compare against the single-layer baseline, so they would fire on a transition that has already been approved. DE/GB/FR/PL are NOT part of this migration and keep their normal gates. (Predecessor allowance 2026-07-canonical-baseline completed 2026-07-15 — see git history.)
scope: Waives ONLY the change gates for IT and ONLY when the candidate hits the declared target exactly. Every absolute check still runs: duplicate ids, missing capacity, unclassified products, ambiguous confirmed listings, listing without an id, German fields outside Germany, GSE-native leakage into non-IT datasets, zero-record parse, missing dataset.
completed_note: Published 2026-07-18: IT datasets (10,835 products incl. the 3,729-product GSE-native layer) uploaded to the auth bucket, gate approved, production manifest updated, all hosting editions redeployed. The allowance is now inert — future IT updates are measured against the two-layer baseline.
